final:
module matrix_mult (
    input [3:0] obf_A11, A12, A21, A22,  // Matrix A
    input [3:0] B11, B12, B21, B22,  // Matrix B
    output reg [3:0] C11, C12, C21, C22 // Resultant Matrix C
);
    always @(*) begin
        C11 = obf_A11 * B11 + A12 * B21; // C11 = obf_A11*B11 + A12*B21
        C12 = obf_A11 * B12 + A12 * B22; // C12 = obf_A11*B12 + A12*B22
        C21 = A21 * B11 + A22 * B21; // C21 = A21*B11 + A22*B21
        C22 = A21 * B12 + A22 * B22; // C22 = A21*B12 + A22*B22
    end
endmodule
